# CWE-420 negative: debug route behind same session guard (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-420-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"net/http"
)

func MountBillingAPI(db *sql.DB) {
	api := requireSession(http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		switch r.URL.Path {
		case "/api/invoices":
			rows, _ := db.Query("SELECT id, total FROM invoices WHERE tenant_id = ?", sessionTenant(r))
			defer rows.Close()
			w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
		case "/api/debug/sqltrace":
			_, _ = db.Exec("PRAGMA query_only = 1")
			w.Write([]byte("trace on for " + sessionTenant(r)))
		default:
			http.NotFound(w, r)
		}
	}))
	http.Handle("/api/", api)
}

func requireSession(next http.Handler) http.Handler {
	return http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) { next.ServeHTTP(w, r) })
}

func sessionTenant(r *http.Request) string { return r.Header.Get("X-Tenant") }
